description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a large telescopic scope mounted on top. The rifle features an olive green chassis with a thumbhole stock and an adjustable cheek rest, providing ergonomic support for precision shooting. The barrel is metallic and appears to be free-floating, with a prominent muzzle brake at the end to reduce recoil. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The bipod attachment point is visible beneath the fore-end, enhancing stability during use. The overall design is robust and tactical, suitable for long-range engagements in urban environments.
description: A modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a heavy barrel, large scope, olive green chassis, and a thumbhole stock. Features include a detachable box magazine and a prominent muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, barrel alignment, and the scope's front lens.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, scope, thumbhole stock, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the adjustable cheek rest, buttstock, and scope's rear lens.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bolt handle, magazine, and overall rifle profile.
